content: schemas.ts exports Zod schemas only (no inferred type aliases); types.ts exports TypeScript interfaces. Both re-exported from index.ts. Using z.infer in the same file as schema definitions causes duplicate-export conflicts in barrel re-exports.
biome.json v2.x removed organizeImports top-level key; use assist.actions.source.organizeImports instead. Schema URL must match installed CLI version (2.4.6).

name: vitest-coverage-exclusions
description: Exclude types.ts (pure TS interfaces, no runtime code) and index.ts (barrel re-exports) from vitest v8 coverage. Only measure ids.ts, schemas.ts, version.ts.
